zh.lifeSummary: 當William Lord of Kidwelly de Londres於大約1050年出生在英國哈普爾比曉普斯托可時，他的父親Simon de Londres24歲，母親Sibylla de Molle24歲。他和Matilda de Molle至少有2個兒子。他去世於大約1106年在威爾士格拉莫爾根布利其史德享年58歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Kidwelly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon, and Glamorgan in Scotland): nickname from Middle English kid ‘kid, young goat’ + wild ‘wild’, i.e. ‘frisky as a kid’.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When William Lord of Kidwelly de Londres was born about 1050, in Bishopstoke, Hampshire, England, his father, Simon de Londres, was 24 and his mother, Sibylla de Molle, was 24. He had at least 2 sons with Matilda de Molle. He died about 1106, in Bridgend, Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 58, and was buried in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Lord of Kidwelly de Londres est né environ 1050, à Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Simon de Londres, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Sibylla de Molle, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Matilda de Molle. Il est décédé environ 1106, à Bridgend, Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Lord of Kidwelly de Londres(이)가 대략 1050년 영국 함프실르 비숍스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Londres(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibylla de Molle(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Matilda de Molle(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1106년 웨일스 글램르건 브리지드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 글램르건에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Lord of Kidwelly de Londres родился около 1050 г. в местности бишопсток, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Simon de Londres было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Sibylla de Molle, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Matilda de Molle. Он умер около 1106 г. в местности бридженд, глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.
